detailed_description: This video meticulously demonstrates a crucial step in leather crafting: punching stitching holes. A craftsman carefully positions a multi-pronged stitching chisel onto a piece of layered leather, featuring distinct textures and colors. With precise strikes of a hammer, a series of evenly spaced holes are created along the edge of the leather, preparing it for hand-stitching. The repetitive action highlights the dedication to precision and the use of specialized tools in creating high-quality leather goods.

segments.why_kept: This segment is the semantic core as it clearly showcases the core process and labor involved in creating stitching holes in leather. It demonstrates the product (stitching chisel) in use, highlights the craftsman's skill and precision, and provides a macro detail view of the 'Mechanism_Of_Action'.
